comments.post_body:
🚀 Exciting Opportunity for Recent Grads: Associate Solutions Architect at AWS 🎓 

Are you passionate about AI and cloud technology? Ready to launch your career at the forefront of innovation? Amazon Web Services is seeking talented early-career technologists for an Associate Solutions Architect position starting May 11, 2026.

Locations: Arlington, VA | Austin, TX | Seattle, WA

Why This Role?
This is your opportunity to work alongside experienced AWS architects and learn how to design real-world cloud and AI architectures used by some of the most innovative companies in the world. You'll work directly with customers ranging from startups to global enterprises, helping them architect scalable, resilient solutions that solve real business problems. You'll be a trusted customer advocate, guiding organizations through cloud and AI adoption and best practices.

AI at the Core
We're especially excited about candidates with experience in AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Machine Learning. As AI continues to reshape every industry, you'll be at the center of helping organizations harness these transformative technologies on AWS.

What You'll Do:
✅  Design, architect, and prototype solutions that address complex customer challenges
✅  Evangelize AWS services and best practices across diverse organizations
✅  Partner with developers, architects, and business stakeholders to accelerate cloud and AI adoption
✅  Translate customer feedback into actionable requirements for product teams

What We're Looking For:
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related field (graduation date May 2024 - April 2026)
• Programming experience (Java, Python, Ruby, Node.js, Go, Rust, C#)
• Experience building applications with AI, including LLMs or generative AI models
• Excellent communication skills for technical and non-technical audiences, including public speaking
• Background in analytics, security, storage, DevOps, or application development

Bonus Points:
• AWS or industry certifications
• Experience with frameworks, design patterns, and software delivery

Start Date: May 11, 2026

This is your chance to build the future developing both your technical expertise and business acumen. If you're a self-starter ready to make a significant impact and help customers craft highly scalable, flexible cloud architectures, we want to hear from you!

#AWS #CloudComputing #SolutionsArchitect #AI #GenerativeAI #MachineLearning #CareerOpportunity #TechJobs #CloudArchitecture #Innovation #ArlingtonVA #AustinTX #SeattleWA

Interested? Apply now and come build the future with us! 🌟 https://lnkd.in/eA8jNCeY
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a job posting for an Associate Solutions Architect position at Amazon Web Services, which is seeking recent graduates with a passion for AI and cloud technology to work with customers and design scalable solutions. The role involves designing and prototyping solutions, evangelizing AWS services, and partnering with stakeholders to accelerate cloud and AI adoption.

comments.comment_body: Congratulations! Restoring Human touch in healthcare is an absolute must - great work and all the best :)
comments.post_body:
𝐖𝐄’𝐑𝐄 𝐈𝐍 𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐁𝐄𝐒 🤯 🤯 🤯 

Mum, I think we made it.

Waking up last week and seeing Juno featured in Forbes felt surreal.

Just 6 months ago, Juno didn’t exist. It was just Isaac Tolley and me working on a research project at Oxford and UCL, trying to improve life for people living with chronic illness.

We knew the healthcare system was broken. 𝟭𝗕 people live with chronic disease.

Most spend years waiting for a diagnosis and without any form of support.

At Juno, we’re changing that. How?

→ Supporting patients 24/7, not just during a 10-minute appointment
→ Analysing millions of parameters from each individual’s health history, every single day
→ Cutting diagnosis time from years to months

We’ve already helped support over 30,000 people - and we’re just getting started…
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about Juno, a healthcare company that aims to improve life for people with chronic illnesses, which was recently featured in Forbes after just six months of existence. The company's founders are working to change the broken healthcare system by providing 24/7 support and cutting diagnosis time from years to months.

comments.post_body:
𝗦𝗼𝗳𝘁𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 - 𝗘𝗮𝗿𝗹𝘆 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗲𝗿 𝗿𝗼𝗹𝗲 𝗮𝘁 Google

It’s that time of year again! 🚀

The Software Engineer, Early Career role at Google is officially dropping on March 16, 2026.

Exactly one year ago, I was in your shoes. I saw this exact same role in a post , took a leap of faith, and applied. Fast forward six months, and I was walking through the doors for my first day at Google.

If you’re waiting for a sign to apply - this is it. Stop underestimating your potential.

𝗠𝘆 𝗮𝗱𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲:

 • Get your resume polished and ready this weekend.

 • Set a calendar reminder for Monday.

 • Apply as soon as the portal opens.

Good luck to everyone applying! You’ve got this. 💻✨

Link to apply: https://lnkd.in/gD8WDCtT
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about a Software Engineer, Early Career role at Google that is set to open on March 16, 2026, and is sharing their personal experience of applying for the role and encouraging others to do the same. The commenter is advising potential applicants to prepare their resumes and apply as soon as the portal opens.

We are currently hiring 2 Software Engineer II and 2 Senior Software Engineer positions within our organization, focused on Security, Identity, and Access Management.
Our teams design and operate large-scale, distributed systems that power critical security and identity workflows. We maintain a high bar for engineering excellence—seeking individuals who demonstrate strong system design fundamentals, a track record of building and operating resilient distributed systems, and a commitment to quality, ownership, and long-term maintainability.
We are particularly interested in engineers who are passionate about integrating Security and AI into everyday workflows to deliver intelligent, scalable, and secure solutions.
If you thrive in high-impact environments and hold yourself to exceptional technical standards, we encourage you to apply to the roles below: https://lnkd.in/gXacDCkU 
and https://lnkd.in/gBhrcGEU

comments.post_body:
We're #hiring in the US! 🚀 DM me directly to discuss these exciting opportunities.

Our 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗔𝗱𝘀 𝗚𝗿𝗼𝘄𝘁𝗵 - 𝗥𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 & 𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 team is expanding! We're a pioneering force in Ads Ranking, developing cutting-edge ML systems that drive performance across Meta's ads products. Our team is one of the 𝘁𝗼𝗽 𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘂𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗯𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀 for Meta's Ads business—and we're just getting started.

✨ 𝗢𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: 
• E4/E5 Machine Learning Engineer
• E4/E5 Systems (Infra) Engineer

🔍 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗬𝗼𝘂'𝗹𝗹 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝗢𝗻: 
• 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴: Pioneer groundbreaking architectures and ML algorithms that maximize ads performance 
• 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮: Leverage large-scale, heterogeneous data including privacy-preserved signals and advertiser-trusted data 
• 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗲-𝗼𝗳-𝘁𝗵𝗲-𝗔𝗿𝘁 𝗠𝗟: Bridge theoretical advances with real-world application—from transformers to the next big breakthrough 
• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗯𝗹𝗲𝗺 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Shape innovative hypotheses that open new doors in ads ranking
• 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲: Build and scale production ML systems that serve billions of ad requests daily

🚀 𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗝𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗨𝘀: 
• Real impact on one of Meta's core revenue engines 
• Cutting-edge ML: Deep neural networks, transformers, and beyond 
• Strong support: Dedicated mentors, structured onboarding, and weekly 1:1s with your manager 
• Growth-focused culture with quarterly promotion doc reviews

We value impact over hierarchy. Interested? Drop me a message!

#hiring #MachineLearning #MLEngineering #ArtificialIntelligence #AdTech #MetaCareers

Excited to share that I’m joining "The Influence & Impact Salon" as a speaker on February 14 in San Francisco 💛

It’s a curated morning for women leaders exploring:
- How to strategically cultivate influence while staying authentic 
- How to leverage influence for greater impact.

Honored to share the stage with an incredible lineup of women speakers
Come meet them in person in SF:

- Mariane Bekker
- Amanda Todd
- Tara Zachariah

Huge thank you to Sara Anderson for organizing and curating this room so intentionally

comments.post_body:
🚀 Hiring: Associate Product Owner – AI & Machine Learning

I’m partnering with Joseph Chacko Vellukunnel to hire an early-career Associate Product Owner within our AI & Data organization.

This role supports product management across:
 • Predictive ML models (CLV, churn, propensity)
 • Decisioning & workflow automation systems
 • Generative AI initiatives

We’re looking for someone who:
 ✔ Has 1–2 years of experience
 ✔ Ideally holds a Master’s (MBA, Data Analytics, Engineering, or similar)
 ✔ Is comfortable partnering with data scientists & ML engineers
 ✔ Is hands-on in Jira, writing user stories, managing backlogs, and supporting Agile ceremonies
 ✔ Has experience with coding or data-focused projects

This is a strong opportunity for someone building a career in AI & data product management and looking for meaningful exposure in a complex enterprise environment.

👉 If this sounds like you, I encourage you to apply.
🔁 If you know someone who fits, please share with your network.

#AIJobs #MachineLearning #ProductManagement #GenAI #EarlyCareer #Hiring
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a job posting for an Associate Product Owner role in AI and Machine Learning, which involves supporting product management across various AI initiatives and requires 1-2 years of experience and a Master's degree. The role is a potential opportunity for early-career professionals looking to build a career in AI and data product management.

comments.post_body:
Exa (raised $85M at $700M valuation) is hiring in San Francisco - and they sponsor visas. 

They're growing fast and need engineers, designers, support, and recruiters across all levels.

2021 - Founded in SF to build search infrastructure for AI
2025 - $700M valuation with 50+ team members

Will Bryk and Jeffrey Wang recognized early that building real search infra for AI requires global talent - so they actively sponsor visas for exceptional candidates.

Here's what they're looking for:

1/  Head of AI Research ($250K-$500K + equity) - Lead LLM and information retrieval research. Requires 4+ years AI research experience.

2/  Infrastructure Engineer ($150K-$300K + equity) - Build GPU cluster orchestration on $20M systems and scale AWS batch jobs across tens of thousands of machines.

3/  Automation Engineer ($150K-$300K + equity) - Optimize internal processes with AI. Heavy use of Cursor, Claude, Devin.

4/  Research, Evals ($150K-$300K + equity) - Design frameworks that define what perfect search looks like. Build pipelines that track quality across billions of documents.

5/  Designer ($150K-$280K + equity) - Own brand identity and developer experience design. Strong visual design + product judgment.

6/  Founding Security Engineer ($150K-$300K + equity) - Build security infrastructure for web-scale data processing and own compliance and system hardening efforts.

7/  Head of Data Partnerships ($180K-$300K + above market equity) - Run the full partnership cycle - outreach, negotiation, close. Make the data acquisition decisions that shape Exa’s competitive edge.

8/  Support Engineer ($120K-$200K + equity) - Handle technical support and automate systems and work with Jeeyoung Kim (Head of Engineering) to scale support.

9/  GTM Recruiter ($100K-$180K + equity) - Build recruiting infrastructure using in-house AI tools and work with Stanislava Tarasiuk to scale the team.

This list isn’t exhaustive. More roles on Exa’s careers page - with visa sponsorship for international candidates (STEM OPT, H-1B, O-1, E-3, OPT).

Adding a direct link to their career page in the comments.
comments.context_summary: Exa, a company that has raised $85M at a $700M valuation, is hiring for various roles in San Francisco, including engineers, designers, and recruiters, and is sponsoring visas for exceptional candidates. The company is looking to fill positions across different levels, with salaries ranging from $100K to $500K, and is emphasizing its need for global talent to build search infrastructure for AI.

comments.post_body:
I'm reaching out to share that I was recently impacted by the layoffs at Amazon and am actively seeking my next opportunity in data and analytics.

I bring 9 years of experience building scalable data solutions and driving data-informed decision-making, including 3.5 years at Amazon. I hold a Master's degree in Data Science and am exploring roles as a Data Engineer, Business Intelligence Engineer, Analytics Engineer, or Senior Data/Business Analyst.

I'm grateful for the opportunity to have worked alongside such talented and inspiring colleagues at Amazon. The experience and relationships I've built have been invaluable to my growth.

I'm currently on a visa with time-sensitive employment requirements and am open to relocating anywhere in the US.

If you're hiring or know of relevant openings, I'd greatly appreciate an introduction or referral. Even a brief conversation or sharing this post with your network would be incredibly valuable during this transition.
Thank you for any support you can offer.

#OpenToWork #DataEngineering #BusinessIntelligence #DataAnalytics #AnalyticsEngineer #DataScience #Hiring #Referrals
comments.context_summary: The commenter was laid off from Amazon and is seeking a new opportunity in data and analytics, leveraging their 9 years of experience and Master's degree in Data Science to explore roles such as Data Engineer or Senior Data Analyst. They are open to relocating and appreciate any introductions, referrals, or support during this transition.

comments.post_body:
What a way to begin 2026..
and we aren't even at the end of January!

Based on popular demand, at the end of last year,
I decided to organize a three day meditation retreat for executives in my network..
followed by a CxO Summit.. 
and we went on a limb and invited as many CxOs of public and late stage companies as we could.

And here we are..
- we managed an amazing three day meditation retreat by the Art of Living with 42 executives and founders
- hosted two dinners with 50+ people
- a day long summit with 40+ CxOs from public and late stage private companies alongside our portfolio founders (we have 50+ startups I've helped now including from our own accelerator)

Grateful for the support of our partners, founders, our bank, and vendors to have carried me forth on this expedition.

Here are some pictures, and here's to 2026!

We have a Davos special, if you missed the retreat.
Come back and join us for this smaller & shorter retreat:

Art of Living premium | Jan 31-Feb 2
Saturday, Sunday 2-5:30pm, Monday 5:30-8:30pm PST
https://lnkd.in/g7j4W2Wg

and our next summit is on Feb 6 in Palo Alto:
Agentic AI Summit: https://lnkd.in/gQmRcnD4

Big thank you to Citizens WilmerHale Google and Amberflo.ai

After four incredible years at Amazon, building high-performing teams, solving analytics and data governance challenges at Amazon scale and working with some amazing people, I’m excited to begin my next adventure.

I’m happy to share that I’ve joined Docker as Director of Engineering, helping shape an exciting vision. I’ll also be building a new engineering team across multiple levels—reach out if you’re interested.
